task: Wire all static pre-push locked guards into GitHub Actions CI so git push --no-verify cannot silently break a locked rule. Adds .github/workflows/locked-guards.yml with 36 static guards that all PASS on main (aadf2aab).
details: locked-guards.yml: 36 static guards, one step each, no continue-on-error, no || true
All 36 guards verified PASS on aadf2aab before wiring
1 excluded guard (verify:no-orphan-migration-ledger-entries) needs DATABASE_URL — db-gated, not added
run-guard-audit.mjs: audit helper script used to verify guards before wiring
